title: S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 Roadmap
architecturalInvariants: Milestone 16 completes the Portable Offline Base MVP.
Milestone 24 completes S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 within declared supported scope.
Post-Base milestones are planned-only until implemented and certified by their own evidence.
No planned milestone may silently add Runtime authority, web authority, mobile authority, or business authority.
Human approval is required before external communication, delivery, payment, contracts, or high-risk actions.

milestones.name: Real-World Pilot and Defect Burn-Down
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. is exercised against real local work and the release-blocking defects are made visible and prioritized.
nonGuarantees: does not certify Personal and Professional V1 release
does not permit unattended client delivery

milestones.name: Nontechnical UX, Reliability, Updates, and Recovery
requires: no terminal requirement for ordinary use
milestones.guarantee: A nontechnical operator can install, start, understand, maintain, update, roll back, back up, and restore S.E.R.A. through ordinary product surfaces.
nonGuarantees: does not certify enterprise deployment
does not remove advanced developer/operator diagnostics

milestones.name: Real Local Intelligence and Multimodal Runtime
requires: retrieval or embedding model where justified
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. can use certified local intelligence and bounded multimodal processors with provenance and hardware-aware limits.
nonGuarantees: does not guarantee every model output is correct
does not certify unrestricted media understanding

milestones.name: Multi-Studio Professional Capability Portfolio
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. has multiple certified professional Studios with exact versions, evidence, review, delivery packaging, limitations, and rollback readiness.
nonGuarantees: does not certify every professional domain
does not certify universal document or website generation

milestones.name: Professional Services and Fiverr Operations
requires: human approval before external communication or delivery
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. can help produce professional service packages and Fiverr-style delivery evidence under human approval.
nonGuarantees: does not define unattended Fiverr-account automation
does not authorize client communication or delivery without human approval
does not authorize payments or contracts

milestones.name: Governed Web, Browser, and External Tool Runtime
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. can use the public web, browser surfaces, and external tools only through governed, evidenced, revocable authorization.
nonGuarantees: does not permit silent browsing
does not permit unrestricted account access
does not permit unreviewed uploads or form submissions

milestones.name: Secure Mobile Gateway and iOS Companion
milestones.boundary: The complete Runtime remains on the desktop or privately controlled host; the iOS companion supervises and submits work.
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. can be securely supervised from iPhone through paired, revocable mobile credentials.
nonGuarantees: does not promise the complete S.E.R.A. Runtime running entirely on iPhone
does not permit unrecoverable lost-device authority

milestones.name: S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 Release
requires: nontechnical installation without Git or Codex
no terminal requirement for ordinary use
one real Fiverr-style project from intake to delivery package
distributable versioned Personal and Professional V1 release
milestones.guarantee: S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 is a locally controlled, nontechnical, desktop-and-mobile-supervised intelligence operating system capable of ingesting real materials, using certified local models, performing multiple certified professional workflows, using the public web only under governance, evaluating work, preserving evidence, learning from corrections, preventing certified recurring failures, improving capabilities, and producing professional delivery packages.
nonGuarantees: universal expertise
zero mistakes
every professional domain
unattended business authority
unrestricted client communication
unrestricted account access
autonomous payments or contracts
complete Runtime operation entirely on iPhone
enterprise multi-user deployment
distributed Hive Mode
robotics
unrestricted high-risk professional advice
permanent completion of all future S.E.R.A. development

milestoneGuarantees.24: S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 is a locally controlled, nontechnical, desktop-and-mobile-supervised intelligence operating system capable of ingesting real materials, using certified local models, performing multiple certified professional workflows, using the public web only under governance, evaluating work, preserving evidence, learning from corrections, preventing certified recurring failures, improving capabilities, and producing professional delivery packages.

milestoneNonGuarantees: complete Runtime operation entirely on iPhone
permanent completion of all future S.E.R.A. development

personalProfessionalV1.definition: S.E.R.A. Personal and Professional V1 completion within declared supported scope.

afterMilestone24.definition: After Milestone 24, future work is capability, device, domain, enterprise, robotics, distributed-system, and autonomy expansion rather than completion of missing foundational product promises.
afterMilestone24.continuationStatement: After Milestone 24, we choose what S.E.R.A. learns next.

notSupported: complete Runtime operation entirely on iPhone

supportedByMilestone24: certified recurring-failure prevention within declared scope

integrityRequirements: Base MVP manifest must remain unchanged.
Milestones 17 through 24 are planned-only until separately implemented and certified.
No SQLite migration is added by this roadmap lock.
No additional Milestone 13 behavior is implemented by this post-Base roadmap lock.
No post-Base Runtime behavior is implemented by this roadmap lock.
All future implementation must preserve explicit limits and non-guarantees.
